name: CUCUMBER RAITA
intro: This is delicious spooned over biryanis and kebabs. If you want to make it even more exciting, try adding a few small chunks of cooked potato and/or finely chopped green chilli.

ingredients.item: Pinch each of salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Put all the ingredients into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork. Place in the fridge for about 1 hour before serving.
